title: Ancient DNA Shows That Human Evolution Never Slowed Down — It Sped Up After Farming
description: Learn more about new research that analyzed 16,000 ancient genomes and discovered that natural selection hasn’t slowed down.

title: Bolt: As Albanese begs for fossil fuels, Bowen claims we don’t need them
